TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: śĖźÁąĺ¬∑ŤĀĖťĹäŚ•ß(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Raffaello Sanzio da Urbino,1483ŚĻī4śúą6 ¬∑ś°ĎŤíā(Raffaello Santi), . bey-al.Sen-ci-aw. I-Ta-li a kamu, Raffaello Sanzio da Urbino, i 1483 a mihcaan 4 a bilafd 6 a demiad katukuh 1520 a mihcaan 4 a bukad 6 a demiad", nauyaanaay a ngangan ci La-pey-al.san-ti "Raffaello Santi", nganga Mn ci La-pey-al han "La-tin-a kamu "Raphael", I-tali nu mikilitay, patizengay misangay saydan. aci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si atu ci Mi-kay-iang-ci-low pulung a panganngan tu "tatulu cumelakay nanimaad a misulitay". La-bey-al a nikulita pasaayza "i salungan" a pangangan, u nisulitan a tademaw u micidekay ku salungan, u masalunganay ku hekal. . u singanganay niza a nikulitan nu ting-si-kiway "Ma-li-ya" u singku tu kiwkayay atu caay ku nu kiwkayay a salungan palalecad han, u pikilut niza sa uyni "Sen-cyaw-ce a kangyaw nu maedesaay a ngagic" azihan u masatezepay lihalayay. ". ciniza sakay Ban-ti-kang-a tingsikiwc nu mikeliday u puenengay mikulit tu tabakiay a nikulitan a cabeng " Ya-tin-siyan" u micidekay ka salungan ku nikulitan, Po-la-tu atu Ya-li-s-to-te,ciwlu atu sumaaay a kiwkay, hamin han mapapulung, misanga'an tu kasasungaay. namahini misangan' aca tu kayadah ku nisaanga' tu singanganay a nitu'tukan a tadedmaw mahizaay "Lyang-se-se a nitu'tukan a tademaw". . u balucu'niza mangaay, manudeng, atu ciniza malecad ku nikulitan. La-bey-al i 1520 a mihcaan sulalisan papatay i Lu-ma, kapatayan a mihcaan 37 ku mihcaan a nikauzip, padem han i Wan-sen a biyuwan. yadah ku nikulitan niza, misiwbay aca u tabakiay a sakawawan, namahini kanahatu' 37 a mihcaan mapatay, nika yadah ku nisubelitan tu nisanga'an. . caay ku nasaayaway a mihcaan i Lu-ma a nikauzipan niza dada', yadaah ku nikulitan niza uyza amin u sizumaay a nikulitan. i pisakawawan tu niza malepun, uyni a nikulitan a kakapah a tabaki ku sakalilid. i kauzipan niza tada tabaki ku kalilid. nika i likut a kakitizaan nu Low-ma, u nisangaan niza angangan zayhan miedap tu nu sapaday a nikulitan a singanganay. . nikuz namapatay ci La-bey-al, i kucungay ciniza u sakalecad ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low tabaki ku nikalilid, satu katukuh i 18 a lasubu a mihcaan atu 19 lasubu a mihcaan, ci La-bey-al u katemuy kangaay a wayway u nisanga'an kya muliyaw aca a maazih. u nikauzipan niza tu nikauzip taneng malatulu ku nikulitan tulu a lamangan ku cayay ka lecad a wayway. . saka cacay lekad taneng miyung ci Cyaw-al-cyaw.Wa-sa-li apatinaku, i ayaw tu a mihcaan ciniza i Wong-pu-li-ya a mihcaan. saka tusa lekad a demiadan pakala tu sepat a mihcaan "1504 katukuh 1508 " tunian a demiadan i Bo-low-lun-s mihedup u tizaay saalunganay a laylay a nalimaan. sakatulu lekad uyza ciniza i Low-ma nayay ku lawad atu demec tu 12 a mihcaan, sakay tatusaay a tingsikiway nu mikeliday atu kapahay a cabay a nisanga'an.nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ La-bey-al lecuhan yi-ta-li sawali satip a Wiy-ni-s atu Low-ma a laed Ma-al-kay a tabakiay a kakitizaan tu cacay adidi'ay a niyazu' ci U-al-pi-nuo "Urbino", wama u satalakaway nu mikeliday nu Hungti mikulitay tu labu nu tumunaw. La-bey-al i kalalid nu wama niza, La-bey-al yu mulaay henay sa manamuh tu mikulit. ,Śú®1500ŚĻīŚáļŚłę. La-bey-al a wina i 1491 a mahcaan mapatay, itawya walu a mihcaan dada' ci La-bey-al, u wama i 1494 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 1 a demiad mapatay, sabaw cacay a mihcaan mala u tataytayan tu a wawa, ci La-bey-al u midiputay uyza tu u sinaama niza. yu adidi' henay mikilul tu ama minanam mikulit, zikuz maniyul mikilul ci Pey-lu-ci-nuoan a pikulitan minanam mikulit, i 1500 a mihcaan u matinengay tu mikulit.
S.PHON: ******(****:*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo sanzio da urbino,******** ***(*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo santi), . b…ô-ar~…ĺ.s…ôn- ¶i-aw. i-ta-r~…ĺi a kamu, *affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo sanzio da urbino, i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bir~…ĺafd * a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bukad * a d…ômiad", naujaanaaj a ŇčaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺa-p…ô-ar~…ĺ.san-ti "*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo santi", ŇčaŇča mn ¶i r~…ĺa-p…ô-ar~…ĺ ńßan "r~…ĺa-tin-a kamu "*apńßa…ôr~…ĺ", i-tar~…ĺi nu mikir~…ĺitaj, patiz…ôŇčaj misaŇčaj sajdan. a ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si atu ¶i mi-kaj-iaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow pur~…ĺuŇč a paŇčanŇčan tu "tatur~…ĺu ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nanimaad a misur~…ĺitaj". r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ a nikur~…ĺita pasaajza "i sar~…ĺuŇčan" a paŇčaŇčan, u nisur~…ĺitan a tad…ômaw u mi ¶id…ôkaj ku sar~…ĺuŇčan, u masar~…ĺuŇčanaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. . u siŇčaŇčanaj niza a nikur~…ĺitan nu tiŇč-si-kiwaj "ma-r~…ĺi-ja" u siŇčku tu kiwkajaj atu ¶aaj ku nu kiwkajaj a sar~…ĺuŇčan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan, u pikir~…ĺut niza sa ujni "s…ôn- ¶jaw- ¶…ô a kaŇčjaw nu ma…ôd…ôsaaj a Ňčagi ¶" azińßan u masat…ôz…ôpaj r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj. ". ¶iniza sakaj ban-ti-kaŇč-a tiŇčsikiw ¶ nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj u pu…ôn…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺit tu tabakiaj a nikur~…ĺitan a ¶ab…ôŇč " ja-tin-sijan" u mi ¶id…ôkaj ka sar~…ĺuŇčan ku nikur~…ĺitan, po-r~…ĺa-tu atu ja-r~…ĺi-s-to-t…ô, ¶iwr~…ĺu atu sumaaaj a kiwkaj, ńßamin ńßan mapapur~…ĺuŇč, misaŇča Ē~ °an tu kasasuŇčaaj. namańßini misaŇčan Ē~ ° a ¶a tu kajadańß ku nisaaŇča Ē~ ° tu siŇčaŇčanaj a nitu Ē~ °tukan a tad…ôdmaw mańßizaaj "r~…ĺjaŇč-s…ô-s…ô a nitu Ē~ °tukan a tad…ômaw". . u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °niza maŇčaaj, manud…ôŇč, atu ¶iniza mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikur~…ĺitan. r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan sur~…ĺar~…ĺisan papataj i r~…ĺu-ma, kapatajan a mińß ¶aan ** ku mińß ¶aan a nikauzip, pad…ôm ńßan i wan-s…ôn a bijuwan. jadańß ku nikur~…ĺitan niza, misiwbaj a ¶a u tabakiaj a sakawawan, namańßini kanańßatu Ē~ ° ** a mińß ¶aan mapataj, nika jadańß ku nisub…ôr~…ĺitan tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an. . ¶aaj ku nasaajawaj a mińß ¶aan i r~…ĺu-ma a nikauzipan niza dada Ē~ °, jadaańß ku nikur~…ĺitan niza ujza amin u sizumaaj a nikur~…ĺitan. i pisakawawan tu niza mar~…ĺ…ôpun, ujni a nikur~…ĺitan a kakapańß a tabaki ku sakar~…ĺir~…ĺid. i kauzipan niza tada tabaki ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid. nika i r~…ĺikut a kakitizaan nu r~…ĺow-ma, u nisaŇčaan niza aŇčaŇčan zajńßan mi…ôdap tu nu sapadaj a nikur~…ĺitan a siŇčaŇčanaj. . nikuz namapataj ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ, i ku ¶uŇčaj ¶iniza u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid, satu katukuńß i ** a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan atu ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ u kat…ômuj kaŇčaaj a wajwaj u nisaŇča Ē~ °an kja mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a a maazińß. u nikauzipan niza tu nikauzip tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku nikur~…ĺitan tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku ¶ajaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a wajwaj. . saka ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺ…ôkad tan…ôŇč mijuŇč ¶i ¶jaw-ar~…ĺ- ¶jaw.wa-sa-r~…ĺi apatinaku, i ajaw tu a mińß ¶aan ¶iniza i woŇč-pu-r~…ĺi-ja a mińß ¶aan. saka tusa r~…ĺ…ôkad a d…ômiadan pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan "**** katukuńß **** " tunian a d…ômiadan i bo-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s mińß…ôdup u tizaaj saar~…ĺuŇčanaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a nar~…ĺimaan. sakatur~…ĺu r~…ĺ…ôkad ujza ¶iniza i r~…ĺow-ma najaj ku r~…ĺawad atu d…ôm…ô ¶ tu ** a mińß ¶aan, sakaj tatusaaj a tiŇčsikiwaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj atu kapańßaj a ¶abaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an.nikauzipan** r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ji-ta-r~…ĺi sawar~…ĺi satip a wij-ni-s atu r~…ĺow-ma a r~…ĺa…ôd ma-ar~…ĺ-kaj a tabakiaj a kakitizaan tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pi-nuo "urbino", wama u satar~…ĺakawaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu ńßuŇčti mikur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺabu nu tumunaw. r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ i kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu wama niza, r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ ju mur~…ĺaaj ńß…ônaj sa manamuńß tu mikur~…ĺit. ,********. r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ a wina i **** a mańß ¶aan mapataj, itawja war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan dada Ē~ ° ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ, u wama i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mapataj, sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u tatajtajan tu a wawa, ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ u midiputaj ujza tu u sinaama niza. ju adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ama minanam mikur~…ĺit, zikuz manijur~…ĺ mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺu- ¶i-nuoan a pikur~…ĺitan minanam mikur~…ĺit, i **** a mińß ¶aan u matin…ôŇčaj tu mikur~…ĺit.
S.FORM: śĖźÁąĺ¬∑ŤĀĖťĹäŚ•ß(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Raffaello Sanzio da Urbino,1483ŚĻī4śúą6 ¬∑ś°ĎŤíā(Raffaello Santi), . bey-al.Sen-ci-aw. I-Ta-li a kamu, Raffaello Sanzio da Urbino, i 1483 a mihcaan 4 a bilafd 6 a demiad katukuh 1520 a mihcaan 4 a bukad 6 a demiad", nauyaanaay a ngangan ci La-pey-al.san-ti "Raffaello Santi", nganga Mn ci La-pey-al han "La-tin-a kamu "Raphael", I-tali nu mikilitay, patizengay misangay saydan. aci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si atu ci Mi-kay-iang-ci-low pulung a panganngan tu "tatulu cumelakay nanimaad a misulitay". La-bey-al a nikulita pasaayza "i salungan" a pangangan, u nisulitan a tademaw u micidekay ku salungan, u masalunganay ku hekal. . u singanganay niza a nikulitan nu ting-si-kiway "Ma-li-ya" u singku tu kiwkayay atu caay ku nu kiwkayay a salungan palalecad han, u pikilut niza sa uyni "Sen-cyaw-ce a kangyaw nu maedesaay a ngagic" azihan u masatezepay lihalayay. ". ciniza sakay Ban-ti-kang-a tingsikiwc nu mikeliday u puenengay mikulit tu tabakiay a nikulitan a cabeng " Ya-tin-siyan" u micidekay ka salungan ku nikulitan, Po-la-tu atu Ya-li-s-to-te,ciwlu atu sumaaay a kiwkay, hamin han mapapulung, misanga'an tu kasasungaay. namahini misangan' aca tu kayadah ku nisaanga' tu singanganay a nitu'tukan a tadedmaw mahizaay "Lyang-se-se a nitu'tukan a tademaw". . u balucu'niza mangaay, manudeng, atu ciniza malecad ku nikulitan. La-bey-al i 1520 a mihcaan sulalisan papatay i Lu-ma, kapatayan a mihcaan 37 ku mihcaan a nikauzip, padem han i Wan-sen a biyuwan. yadah ku nikulitan niza, misiwbay aca u tabakiay a sakawawan, namahini kanahatu' 37 a mihcaan mapatay, nika yadah ku nisubelitan tu nisanga'an. . caay ku nasaayaway a mihcaan i Lu-ma a nikauzipan niza dada', yadaah ku nikulitan niza uyza amin u sizumaay a nikulitan. i pisakawawan tu niza malepun, uyni a nikulitan a kakapah a tabaki ku sakalilid. i kauzipan niza tada tabaki ku kalilid. nika i likut a kakitizaan nu Low-ma, u nisangaan niza angangan zayhan miedap tu nu sapaday a nikulitan a singanganay. . nikuz namapatay ci La-bey-al, i kucungay ciniza u sakalecad ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low tabaki ku nikalilid, satu katukuh i 18 a lasubu a mihcaan atu 19 lasubu a mihcaan, ci La-bey-al u katemuy kangaay a wayway u nisanga'an kya muliyaw aca a maazih. u nikauzipan niza tu nikauzip taneng malatulu ku nikulitan tulu a lamangan ku cayay ka lecad a wayway. . saka cacay lekad taneng miyung ci Cyaw-al-cyaw.Wa-sa-li apatinaku, i ayaw tu a mihcaan ciniza i Wong-pu-li-ya a mihcaan. saka tusa lekad a demiadan pakala tu sepat a mihcaan "1504 katukuh 1508 " tunian a demiadan i Bo-low-lun-s mihedup u tizaay saalunganay a laylay a nalimaan. sakatulu lekad uyza ciniza i Low-ma nayay ku lawad atu demec tu 12 a mihcaan, sakay tatusaay a tingsikiway nu mikeliday atu kapahay a cabay a nisanga'an.nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ La-bey-al lecuhan yi-ta-li sawali satip a Wiy-ni-s atu Low-ma a laed Ma-al-kay a tabakiay a kakitizaan tu cacay adidi'ay a niyazu' ci U-al-pi-nuo "Urbino", wama u satalakaway nu mikeliday nu Hungti mikulitay tu labu nu tumunaw. La-bey-al i kalalid nu wama niza, La-bey-al yu mulaay henay sa manamuh tu mikulit. ,Śú®1500ŚĻīŚáļŚłę. La-bey-al a wina i 1491 a mahcaan mapatay, itawya walu a mihcaan dada' ci La-bey-al, u wama i 1494 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 1 a demiad mapatay, sabaw cacay a mihcaan mala u tataytayan tu a wawa, ci La-bey-al u midiputay uyza tu u sinaama niza. yu adidi' henay mikilul tu ama minanam mikulit, zikuz maniyul mikilul ci Pey-lu-ci-nuoan a pikulitan minanam mikulit, i 1500 a mihcaan u matinengay tu mikulit.
S.PHON: ******(****:*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo sanzio da urbino,******** ***(*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo santi), . b…ô-ar~…ĺ.s…ôn- ¶i-aw. i-ta-r~…ĺi a kamu, *affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo sanzio da urbino, i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bir~…ĺafd * a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bukad * a d…ômiad", naujaanaaj a ŇčaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺa-p…ô-ar~…ĺ.san-ti "*affa…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo santi", ŇčaŇča mn ¶i r~…ĺa-p…ô-ar~…ĺ ńßan "r~…ĺa-tin-a kamu "*apńßa…ôr~…ĺ", i-tar~…ĺi nu mikir~…ĺitaj, patiz…ôŇčaj misaŇčaj sajdan. a ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si atu ¶i mi-kaj-iaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow pur~…ĺuŇč a paŇčanŇčan tu "tatur~…ĺu ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nanimaad a misur~…ĺitaj". r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ a nikur~…ĺita pasaajza "i sar~…ĺuŇčan" a paŇčaŇčan, u nisur~…ĺitan a tad…ômaw u mi ¶id…ôkaj ku sar~…ĺuŇčan, u masar~…ĺuŇčanaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. . u siŇčaŇčanaj niza a nikur~…ĺitan nu tiŇč-si-kiwaj "ma-r~…ĺi-ja" u siŇčku tu kiwkajaj atu ¶aaj ku nu kiwkajaj a sar~…ĺuŇčan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan, u pikir~…ĺut niza sa ujni "s…ôn- ¶jaw- ¶…ô a kaŇčjaw nu ma…ôd…ôsaaj a Ňčagi ¶" azińßan u masat…ôz…ôpaj r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj. tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid, satu katukuńß i ** a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan atu ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ u kat…ômuj kaŇčaaj a wajwaj u nisaŇča Ē~ °an kja mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a a maazińß. u nikauzipan niza tu nikauzip tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku nikur~…ĺitan tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku ¶ajaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a wajwaj. . saka ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺ…ôkad tan…ôŇč mijuŇč ¶i ¶jaw-ar~…ĺ- ¶jaw.wa-sa-r~…ĺi apatinaku, i ajaw tu a mińß ¶aan ¶iniza i woŇč-pu-r~…ĺi-ja a mińß ¶aan. saka tusa r~…ĺ…ôkad a d…ômiadan pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan "**** katukuńß **** " tunian a d…ômiadan i bo-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s mińß…ôdup u tizaaj saar~…ĺuŇčanaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a nar~…ĺimaan. sakatur~…ĺu r~…ĺ…ôkad ujza ¶iniza i r~…ĺow-ma najaj ku r~…ĺawad atu d…ôm…ô ¶ tu ** a mińß ¶aan, sakaj tatusaaj a tiŇčsikiwaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj atu kapańßaj a ¶abaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an.nikauzipan** r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ji-ta-r~…ĺi sawar~…ĺi satip a wij-ni-s atu r~…ĺow-ma a r~…ĺa…ôd ma-ar~…ĺ-kaj a tabakiaj a kakitizaan tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶i u-ar~…ĺ-pi-nuo "urbino", wama u satar~…ĺakawaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu ńßuŇčti mikur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺabu nu tumunaw. r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ i kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu wama niza, mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mapataj, sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u tatajtajan tu a wawa, ¶i r~…ĺa-b…ô-ar~…ĺ u midiputaj ujza tu u sinaama niza. ju adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ama minanam mikur~…ĺit, zikuz manijur~…ĺ mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺu- ¶i-nuoan a pikur~…ĺitan minanam mikur~…ĺit, i **** a mińß ¶aan u matin…ôŇčaj tu mikur~…ĺit.
